narrative:
Precinct Galena (precinct in Delaware County) has 1,205 registered voters, with 47.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 36.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.9%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.9 percentage points.
